title: Asukas phone
wikitext:
[]: Asuka's phone             Quote Post by AWinters » Fri Aug 21, 2020 4:28 pm What's with Asuka's phone screen displaying the Seele monolith design when she's on the phone to Misato??

[]: Re: Asuka's phone             Quote Post by Arcadia's legacy » Fri Aug 21, 2020 4:42 pm Never mind that, why is the top-half of the phone so weirdly out of proportion?

[]: Re: Asuka's phone             Quote Post by ShinjiStranglesAsuka » Fri Aug 21, 2020 4:47 pm What are the chances that Seele are behind the Bardiel attack on Unit-03? And also did they know that Asuka was swapping with Rei?

[]: Re: Asuka's phone             Quote Post by AWinters » Fri Aug 21, 2020 4:57 pm Arcadia's legacy wrote: Never mind that, why is the top-half of the phone so weirdly out of proportion?

[]: Re: Asuka's phone             Quote Post by AWinters » Fri Aug 21, 2020 5:04 pm ShinjiStranglesAsuka wrote: What are the chances that Seele are behind the Bardiel attack on Unit-03? And also did they know that Asuka was swapping with Rei?

[]: Re: Asuka's phone             Quote Post by AWinters » Fri Aug 21, 2020 5:22 pm Clearer image here. Can anyone read that?

[]: Re: Asuka's phone             Quote Post by FreakyFilmFan4ever » Fri Aug 21, 2020 6:34 pm I can’t read Japanese, but the “Sound Only” screen pops up everywhere in Nerv voice calls to people in NTE. If you look at the scene where Gendo tells Shinji he did a good job with the Falling Angel, you’ll see the Eva’s interface use the same “Sound Only” screen that Asuka has on her phone in this shot.

[]: Re: Asuka's phone             Quote Post by AWinters » Fri Aug 21, 2020 7:26 pm FreakyFilmFan4ever wrote: I can’t read Japanese, but the “Sound Only” screen pops up everywhere in Nerv voice calls to people in NTE. If you look at the scene where Gendo tells Shinji he did a good job with the Falling Angel, you’ll see the Eva’s interface use the same “Sound Only” screen that Asuka has on her phone in this shot.

[]: Re: Asuka's phone             Quote Post by FreakyFilmFan4ever » Fri Aug 21, 2020 7:47 pm Well, they got Seele's layout, I guess. (And they do have a very distinct one.) I always thought Seele's logo was specifically the seven-eyed face, the snake wrapped around the apple, or just the word "SEELE" in boldface. But, yes, since that layout appears to be unique to Seele, then it does look like all of the communication devices the pilots use are provided by Seele. In NGE, a call that Shinji got on his cell (that Misato provided him?) was blocked by Nerv for straying into sensitive information. Even though I'm hesitant to use old lore to interpret new lore, it's not a huge stretch of the imagination to believe that Nerv/Seele would survey the phones they provide their pilots for the same reasons in NTE. I'm not sure how vital to the story this detail will become, though, seeing as how Wille separated from Nerv/Seele. The days of Seele tracking their pilots via company-provided technology seems to be in the past by now.

[]: Re: Asuka's phone             Quote Post by robersora » Wed Aug 26, 2020 6:11 pm I don't know what't the big deal, Seele are in a Sound Only Call, so it's Sound Only, as is Asuka with Misato. They just use the same OS.

[]: Re: Asuka's phone             Quote Post by Reichu » Wed Aug 26, 2020 6:46 pm "Just the same OS" doesn't even make sense, since these are only cell phones (I hope), not core-based technology like what the monoliths use. There's a cut scene where Seele say outright that what happened to Asuka was planned. This is hinted in the final film in more subtle ways -- and this is one of those ways. The red-on-black visual motif is used in connection with "technology that has something mysterious to do with Seele" repeatedly. Having the pilots communicate through little Seele monoliths is really suspicious. This similarity was created where one did not have to exist. If nothing else, it screams "we are observing everything you do to make sure you do precisely what we planned for you". I'm sure it's not a coincidence that the phone is next to a puppet with "Asuka" stitched into it.

[]: Re: Asuka's phone             Quote Post by Gendo'sPapa » Fri Aug 28, 2020 8:27 pm Honestly I just kinda love that these movies go back so far that when 2.0 was made Asuka had a flip phone.

[]: Re: Asuka's phone             Quote Post by orcot » Wed Oct 07, 2020 1:38 pm Gendo'sPapa wrote: Honestly I just kinda love that these movies go back so far that when 2.0 was made Asuka had a flip phone.

[]: Re: Asuka's phone             Quote Post by Lacissal » Thu Oct 08, 2020 8:50 am ShinjiStranglesAsuka wrote: What are the chances that Seele are behind the Bardiel attack on Unit-03? And also did they know that Asuka was swapping with Rei?

[]: Re: Asuka's phone             Quote Post by Tajai » Thu Oct 08, 2020 9:52 pm Gendo'sPapa wrote: Honestly I just kinda love that these movies go back so far that when 2.0 was made Asuka had a flip phone.

[]: Re: Asuka's phone             Quote Post by TMBounty_Hunter » Fri Oct 09, 2020 1:01 pm Ya know, a lot of mysteries wouldn't be mysteries if people either used the best video source available like the BD SPOILER: Show

 OS" doesn't even make sense, since these are only cell phones (I hope), not core-based technology like what the monoliths use.
